plan.title: Waveplan MCP — Feature Parity with Python CLI
notes: Go MCP service at main.go is a rewrite of the Python CLI.
Goal: JSON output on all tools, deptree mode, review_note on end_review, git_sha on fin.
State file format unchanged — new fields default to empty strings.
All work is in this standalone project.

T1.title: Add ReviewNote and GitSha fields to TaskEntry

T2.title: Implement helper functions (findPlanRef, resolveDocRefs, resolveFpRefs, taskInfo, nilIfEmpty, topologicalSort)

T6.title: Convert handleEndReview to JSON + add review_note param

T7.title: Convert handleFin to JSON + add git_sha param

T8.title: Convert handleGet to JSON + add deptree mode

T10.title: Write Go tests for helper functions and task info

T11.title: End-to-end verification with stdio MCP protocol

T1.1.title: Add ReviewNote and GitSha fields to TaskEntry + verify build
notes: Add ReviewNote string with omitempty and GitSha string with omitempty to TaskEntry struct (lines 27-34). Verify go build passes.

T2.1.title: Implement helper functions + verify build
notes: Add findPlanRef, resolveDocRefs, resolveFpRefs, taskInfo, nilIfEmpty, topologicalSort. Follow CLI logic in scripts/waveplan for reference. Verify go build passes.

T3.1.title: Convert handlePeek to JSON output
notes: Use taskInfo() to build JSON. Return error JSON for no-available-tasks case. Verify go build passes.

T4.1.title: Convert handlePop to JSON output
notes: Use taskInfo() + add claimed/taken_by/started_at fields. Verify go build passes.

T5.1.title: Convert handleStartReview to JSON output
notes: Preserve existing fields (TakenBy, StartedAt, ReviewNote, GitSha) when updating. Return JSON with success/task_id/reviewer/review_entered_at. Verify go build passes.

T6.1.title: Convert handleEndReview to JSON + add review_note param
notes: Add review_note optional param to tool def. Preserve existing fields. Return JSON with success/task_id/reviewer/review_ended_at/review_note. Verify go build passes.

T7.1.title: Convert handleFin to JSON + add git_sha param
notes: Add git_sha optional param to tool def. Preserve ReviewNote from taken entry. Return JSON with success/task_id/finished_at/git_sha. Verify go build passes.

T8.1.title: Convert handleGet to JSON + add deptree mode
notes: Replace text output with JSON via taskInfo(). Add deptree mode using topologicalSort(). Pre-compute deptreeSorted to avoid double-call. Return {tasks: [...]} JSON. Verify go build passes.

T9.1.title: Convert handleListPlans to JSON output
notes: Return {plans: [...]} JSON. Verify go build passes.

T10.1.title: Write Go tests for helper functions and task info
notes: Test findPlanRef, topologicalSort, resolveDocRefs, resolveFpRefs, nilIfEmpty, taskInfo. Create main_test.go in worktree. Run go test -v ./...

T11.1.title: End-to-end verification with stdio MCP protocol
notes: Build binary, test each tool via stdio JSON-RPC, verify state file compatibility with Python CLI. Run go build -o waveplan-mcp, then pipe JSON-RPC requests.
T11.1.command: cd . && go build -o waveplan-mcp && echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"waveplan_peek","arguments":{}}}' | ./waveplan-mcp 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read().strip()); print('peek OK' if 'task_id' in d else 'peek FAIL')"
